title: High Density Stack Chair Dolly
features: This Stack Chair Dolly is perfect when it comes time to set-up or remove temporary seating.
The durable steel construction makes this dolly designed especially for commercial usage.
This particular chair dolly is only compatible with the following chairs: ES-F923, ES-F924, ES-F925,, ES-F944

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k
